name: document_id_present
expression: document_id IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(document_id)) > 0
description: Every extracted record must carry a document_id — system invariant required for lineage tracking, regulatory audit trail, and deduplication

name: avg_confidence_acceptable
description: Regulatory submissions require a higher confidence threshold (0.72) due to the legal and compliance risk of misclassified filings; route low-confidence records to human review

name: submission_type_valid
expression: submission_type IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(submission_type)) > 0
description: Submission type is required to route the record to the correct compliance workflow; null or empty values prevent downstream processing

name: submitting_entity_name_not_null
expression: submitting_entity_name IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(submitting_entity_name)) > 0
description: The submitting entity name is a critical identifier for regulatory tracking and OFAC/KYC screening; records without it cannot be processed

name: submission_id_present
expression: submission_id IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(submission_id)) > 0
description: Submission ID (docket number, accession number, reference ID) is required to correlate with regulator records and track filing status

name: submission_date_present
description: Submission date is necessary to calculate response deadlines, monitor review timelines, and meet regulatory reporting SLAs

name: decision_date_after_submission
expression: decision_date IS NULL OR submission_date IS NULL OR decision_date >= submission_date
description: Decision date cannot precede submission date; inversion indicates a date extraction error and flags the record for human review

name: submission_status_valid_enum
expression: submission_status IS NULL OR submission_status IN ('Accepted', 'Under_Review', 'Approved', 'Refused', 'Withdrawn', 'Pending', 'Deficient')
description: Submission status must be a recognized enumeration for accurate compliance dashboard reporting and workflow routing
